transcript: Speaker A: अरे मास्टर जी, क्या कर रहे हो? [Hey Masterji, what are you doing?] Speaker B: दिख नहीं रहा क्या? मैं समोसा खा रहा हूँ। [Can't you see? I am eating samosa.] Speaker A: अच्छा! इसे इंग्लिश में बोलो ज़रा। [Oh! Say this in English.] Speaker B: I Samosa eating. Speaker A: हाहा! समोसा ईटिंग नहीं मास्टर जी, I am Eating Samosa बोलना चाहिए। [Haha! Not 'Samosa eating' Masterji, you should say 'I am Eating Samosa'.] Speaker B: ठीक है यार, इंग्लिश कैसे सीखनी है वो बताओ। [Okay, tell me how to learn English.] Speaker A: रोज़ मेरे साथ सिर्फ 15 मिनट इंग्लिश में बात करते-करते इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो। [You can learn English by talking to me in English for just 15 minutes every day.] Speaker B: मेरे पास पैसे नहीं हैं भाई। [I don't have money, brother.] Speaker A: आप जो समोसा खा रहे हो ना, उससे भी कम खर्चा है मास्टर जी। सिर्फ ₹1 में ऐप को पूरा यूज़ कर सकते हो। [It costs less than the samosa you are eating, Masterji. You can use the entire app for just ₹1.] Speaker B: अच्छा, ज्वाइन कैसे करना है? [Oh, how to join?] Speaker A: नीचे दिए हुए इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। इंग्लिश सीखना आज से ही शुरू करो। [Click on the install button below, download the MySivi app. Start learning English from today.] Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: ARRE MASTER [Hey Master], KYA KAR [What are], DIKH NAHI [Can't see], SAMOSA [Samosa], ACHHA [Oh], ENGLISH [English], I Samosa eating, SAMOSA [Samosa], I am Eating Samosa, THEEK HAI [Okay], SEEKHNI [To learn], ROZ [Daily], 15 MINUTES [15 minutes], BAAT [Talk], ENGLISH [English], PAISE [Money], SAMOSA [Samosa], KHARCHA [Expense], ₹1 [1 Rupee], MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access. Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and Interests. JOIN [Join], NEECHE [Below], INSTALL [Install], MySivi AI English Spe... Pending... Installing... ENGLISH [English], AAJ [Today], MySivi English speaking app, Install Now.
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's broken English in a split-screen format, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users practice speaking. The ad highlights an affordable 3-day premium trial for just ₹1 and prompts viewers to download the app.
